title: Audit hkdf_extract implementation in Rust vs Python for salt=TH_2 and empty-salt edge case
description: Compare Rust hkdf_extract using Hkdf::extract(Some(salt)) with Python _hkdf_extract (which defaults empty salt to 32 zero bytes). Ensure identical PRK outputs. Update if salt handling diverges. Reference test/vectors/edhoc.json
close_reason: Aligned hkdf_extract with Python empty-salt default (uses None for HKDF zero-salt) ensuring identical PRK outputs for TH_2 and edge cases. Updated rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs:244. Tests and vectors consistent. No subbeads created.
